creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

the mailinglists

- freebsd-wireless
- freebsd-chromium
- freebsd-tilera
- freebsd-toolchain

are now available on http://docs.freebsd.org/mail.  Thanks to whoever 
added them to index.

But freebsd-sysinstall is still missing.  It is not in the index and 
there also no subfolders for this mailinglist.  And it is also not 
available via www.FreeBSD.org/search.  Although this a valid mailing 
list.  Strange.

I can add it to the website search but I cannot make it available on 
docs.FreeBSD.org/mail.  Would it be possible for one of you to add this 
one, too?  Because then I could close this PR.  Thank you.

Regards.

jkois


-- 
  Johann Kois
  jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
  FreeBSD Documentation Project
  FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
